claims.claim: Does not share data with third-party advertisers
Does not sell personal information to data brokers
Uses cookies only for cart functionality, not cross-site tracking
Does not knowingly collect data from children under 13
Deletes account data within 30 days of account closure
Does not access precise device location without consent
Does not use analytics tools to build cross-site user profiles

verdicts.claim: Does not share data with third-party advertisers
verdicts.explanation: Traffic shows requests to two known ad-tech domains, including doubleclick.net, within seconds of page load — directly conflicting with the no-third-party-advertising claim.

verdicts.claim: Does not sell personal information to data brokers
verdicts.explanation: Domain-level traffic alone cannot confirm whether data is sold to brokers versus merely shared for ad delivery; no domain in this scan is classified specifically as a data-broker endpoint.

verdicts.claim: Uses cookies only for cart functionality, not cross-site tracking
verdicts.explanation: Requests to both an analytics domain and a social-tracking pixel indicate cookies are used well beyond cart functionality.

verdicts.claim: Does not knowingly collect data from children under 13
verdicts.explanation: Age-related data handling is not observable from network traffic alone; no evidence in this scan speaks to this claim either way.

verdicts.claim: Deletes account data within 30 days of account closure
verdicts.explanation: Data-retention timelines are not observable via traffic capture; would require a documentation or process audit.

verdicts.claim: Does not access precise device location without consent
verdicts.explanation: No geolocation-related network calls were observed in this scan, but absence of evidence is not confirmation of the claim.

verdicts.claim: Does not use analytics tools to build cross-site user profiles
verdicts.explanation: A request to a domain classified as ad-tech through the extended pattern check (not on the static blocklist) indicates cross-site profiling infrastructure is active.
